doc.question: What are the instructions listed on the box?
answers: brown stir in items reduce heat simmer 10 min sprinkle toppings
brown beef in pan drain stir in watermill sauce pasta into pan boil simmer 10 min
brown ground beef then stir in hot water milk pasta sauce mix

resps: Brown ground beef in 10-inch skillet; drain. Stir in hot water, milk, Sauce Mix and uncooked Pasta. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat. Cover; simmer about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender. Remove from heat; uncover (sauce will thicken). Sprinkle with Topping. Refrigerate leftovers. Increase simmer time to about 12 min.
filtered_resps: Brown ground beef in 10-inch skillet; drain. Stir in hot water, milk, Sauce Mix and uncooked Pasta. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat. Cover; simmer about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender. Remove from heat; uncover (sauce will thicken). Sprinkle with Topping. Refrigerate leftovers. Increase simmer time to about 12 min.
